texto: In some ways, I feel like the strength of animation is in its simplicity and caricature, and in reduction. It's like an Al Hirschfeld caricature, where he'll use, like, three lines, and he'll capture the likeness of someone so strongly that it looks more like them than a photograph. I think animation has that same power of reduction.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pete Docter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “In some ways, I feel like the strength of animation is in its simplicity and caricature, and in r…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, power, simplicity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de simplicity e think.

texto: 'Toy Story' we found, sorta by accident, because we didn't know what we were doing, the idea of being replaced by somebody. Everybody has that fear, or encounters this jealousy at some point.
explicacao: Citação de Pete Docter sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “'Toy Story' we found, sorta by accident, because we didn't know what we were doing, the idea of b…” articula coragem, fear, story em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como story e know.
